title: This AI Chinese model is 15X cheaper?
summary: MiniMax M3 is a long-context language model released on OpenRouter that uses Sparse Attention to process large documents and codebases 15.6x faster than comparable models while reducing compute costs by approximately 95 percent.
writeup: The video covers MiniMax M3, a long-context language model released on OpenRouter that applies Sparse Attention to handle large documents and codebases. The key claims: M3 processes long-context inputs 15.6x faster than comparable models and cuts compute costs by roughly 95 percent. The mechanism matters because Sparse Attention targets token efficiency, which is the bottleneck for working across extended contexts.
